note: Speckle version history is NOT acceptance history. A Speckle version counts as part of the project record only if it is backed by an entry in this ledger whose export_payload_hash still matches the payload it published. The Python/QGIS repo gates remain the sole acceptance authority; this file is the repo's record of which review versions mirror a gated, committed state.

entries.notes: BACKFILL ratification of the pre-existing live accepted version (docs/speckle_publish_ledger.md §7). No new Speckle version was created and the live model was not touched; this entry records that the existing live version mirrors a gated, committed repo state.

backfill.reason: First/curated accepted publish (a6e9dab770) predated the Phase-2 ledger, so the webhook correctly FLAGged it as un-ratified.
backfill.reproduction_method: export_speckle_payload.py default accepted bundle (Seating/ADA/Reference) is byte-deterministic from committed unreal_export/ (provenance git_commit 84aa207, generated 2026-06-17T18:26:42-04:00). backfill.repo_clean_note: repo_clean records the clean publish-basis commit 3556cd9; the working tree at backfill time carried unrelated uncommitted docs (deploy/speckle/README.md, docs/proxmox_speckle.md, docs/speckle_review_runbook.md).
